channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Are Iran’s athletes political pawns?
item.description: Samantha Johnson looks at how Iran’s women footballers became caught in the middle of geopolitics.

item.title: Gabbard says Pakistan missiles a future threat to US, but experts push back
item.description: The US raises concerns but analysts say Pakistan’s missile programme focuses on India, which has longer-range missiles.

item.title: Iran hits Qatar gas operations in response to Israeli attack
item.description: Qatar’s main gas facility is among the energy sites targeted by Iran after its own main gas field was hit in an attack.

item.title: Strikes kill two PMF fighters in northern Iraq amid wider war, group says
item.description: Strikes come hours after pro-Iran armed group Kataib Hezbollah announces conditional suspension of US embassy attacks.

item.title: US East Asian allies in legal quandary as Trump seeks help in the Middle East
item.description: US President Donald Trump is expected to discuss the Strait of Hormuz with Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi.

item.title: Iran to ‘boycott’ World Cup in US but will not withdraw from 2026 event
item.description: Iran scheduled to play their three FIFA World Cup 2026 group games in United States, but Mexico is an alternative.

item.title: Trump denies knowledge of Israeli gas field attack
item.description: Donald Trump said the US was unaware of Israel’s South Pars strike and warned Iran against targeting Qatar.

item.title: Iran war: What’s the Jones Act, and why has Trump suspended it for 60 days?
item.description: The move allows foreign-flagged vessels to transport goods between US ports for the next 60 days.

item.title: US weighs sending thousands of troops to region as Iran war rages: Report
item.description: The deployments could help provide Trump with additional options but would further entrench US in a foreign war.

item.title: War enters new phase as Israel attack on Iran gasfield sparks Gulf response
item.description: Saudis have warned of 'military actions, if necessary', but Gulf states in 'diplomatic bind' as they mull response.
